title: Fish's overhaul
description: A modpack that enhances the minecraft experience.
body:
# Fish's minecraft overhaul

Minecraft is great, but sometimes it needs a little extra spark. This modpack is here to enhance your gameplay with a blend of quality of life improvements, beautiful shaders, and fresh game mechanics. It introduces new world generation, stunning visuals, and immersive features that breathe life into your builds and adventures.

Make sure to support the incredible creators behind these mods, shaders, and resources—check out their work and give them some love!



**Dive in, and experience Minecraft like never before.**

**All of fish's projects support WWF, help support the animals.
[Show support!](https://protect.worldwildlife.org/page/71435/donate/1?en_og_source=Web_Donation&ea.tracking.id=Web_Topnav&supporter.appealCode=AWE2402OQ18299A01179RX)**
